unsupported.com.atproto.label.queryLabels: Label querying belongs to a labeler service; this PDS does not publish labels.
unsupported.com.atproto.label.subscribeLabels: Label streaming belongs to a labeler service; this PDS only streams repo events.
unsupported.com.atproto.moderation.createReport: Moderation report intake is a moderation-service surface, not part of the repo/account host path.
unsupported.com.atproto.sync.notifyOfUpdate: Crawler notification is consumed by crawlers/relays; this PDS exposes subscribeRepos instead.
unsupported.com.atproto.sync.requestCrawl: Persistent crawling is a relay/crawler responsibility, not a local PDS endpoint.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.addReservedHandle: Temporary Bluesky signup surface; handle reservation is managed through admin/account APIs here.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.checkHandleAvailability: Temporary Bluesky signup surface; account creation and admin checks enforce handle availability.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.checkSignupQueue: Temporary Bluesky signup queue surface; this PDS does not operate a signup waitlist.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.dereferenceScope: Temporary OAuth/debug helper, not required for this PDS runtime.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.fetchLabels: Temporary label fetch surface; this PDS is not a labeler.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.requestPhoneVerificatio: Temporary Bluesky signup surface; this PDS does not require phone verification.
unsupported.com.atproto.temp.revokeAccountCredential: Temporary credential-revocation surface; this PDS uses standard session/app-password/admin flows.

extraImplemented.com.atproto.server.changePassword: Implemented for password users and covered by account smoke, but not present in the current @atproto/api generated method set.
